personal_insight: Corner lot with mature trees. Kitchen was fully remodeled in 2022 which adds value above standard comps.
Backs to greenbelt with no rear neighbors. Original hardwood floors throughout add character and value.
Updated HVAC system in 2023. Walking distance to new elementary school increases family appeal.
Solar panels installed 2022 with transferable warranty. Lower utility costs add to buyer appeal.
Pool and outdoor kitchen added in 2021. Premium lot at end of cul-de-sac with extra side yard.
